purpose: Retest Hadoop cleanup failures under an earlier kill-transition anchor so the selected alert no longer exposes remote cleanup semantics directly while the raw-window still retains the surrounding failure progression.

cases.eligibility_note: Earlier cleanup anchor that removes both the direct cleanup-failed line and the explicit remote-cleanup event from the selected-alert window.
